reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to consider Hunter's tiered subcutaneous protocol — Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26) frames it as 'three specific protocols tailored to different situations' with 'Dosage: 500 mcg (0.5 mg) subcutaneously daily' for longevity/maintenance, 'Dosage: 1 mg subcutaneously daily' for intermediate (long COVID, asthma, mild COPD), and 'Dosage: 2 mg subcutaneously daily' for severe/acute respiratory conditions. We'd ask the prescribing physician to weigh duration because Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26) lists '30 days, repeated every 4–6 months' for the longevity tier and '30–45 days' for the intensive tier, while the newer Hunter email threadId 19af0c0c3b0300ba (2025-12-05) extends a 5-peptide lung-stack including Bronchogen at '2 mg | Injection | 12 weeks.' Taylor and Trevor have no published Bronchogen content, so the synthesis is single-expert and Hunter himself frames the data as preliminary.
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Single-expert evidence base: Taylor Williams and Dr Trevor Bachmeyer have no Bronchogen mentions in the corpus — this card draws entirely from Hunter Williams emails.
- Hunter's own hedging on the evidence: Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26): "The data is limited, but after experimenting with several of them and getting feedback from my inner circle, I feel confident in the new peptide cheat sheet I will put out with these injectable bioregulators."
- Hunter email threadId 19af0c0c3b0300ba (2025-12-05): "All of this is experimental. I'm just a guy on the internet who loves reading studies and has seen this work in real people, including my own family."
- Animal/cellular-data preponderance: Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26): "Bronchogen has shown impressive potential in multiple animal and cellular studies, with powerful real-world testimonials from biohackers, integrative clinicians, and patients themselves."
- Dose-tier duration ceiling — Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26) caps the intensive 2 mg/day tier at "30–45 days," but the newer Hunter email threadId 19af0c0c3b0300ba (2025-12-05) runs 2 mg/day for "12 weeks" inside a 5-peptide lung stack — clinician should reconcile.
- Route is exclusively subcutaneous injection across all Hunter sources — Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26): "2 mg Bronchogen, injected subcutaneously, daily for at least 30 days."
- No female-specific signal: Taylor Williams has no Bronchogen content, so fertility/hormone-context guidance is absent — clinician should not extrapolate.
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: Single-expert synthesis — only Hunter Williams has published Bronchogen content. Cross-expert consensus is not assessable from the corpus. Hunter's own internally-consistent claim across two emails: route is subcutaneous injection. Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26): "2 mg Bronchogen, injected subcutaneously, daily for at least 30 days." Hunter email threadId 19af0c0c3b0300ba (2025-12-05) lists Bronchogen at "2 mg | Injection | 12 weeks" inside the 5-peptide lung stack. Mechanism framing also internally consistent: Hunter email threadId 19af0c0c3b0300ba (2025-12-05): "Injectable bioregulators penetrate lung cells, get into nucleus, bind DNA + histone proteins" and "Bioregulator peptide derived from bronchial tissue."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: No cross-expert disagreement assessable — Taylor Williams and Dr Trevor Bachmeyer have no Bronchogen mentions in the corpus. Within Hunter's own content, the duration of the 2 mg/day intensive tier shifts between sources: Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26): "Dosage: 2 mg subcutaneously daily" / "Duration: 30–45 days" / "Ideal For: Severe COPD cases (like my father-in-law), advanced emphysema, severe chronic inflammation, or acute respiratory conditions needing rapid and profound repair," while the newer Hunter email threadId 19af0c0c3b0300ba (2025-12-05) lists "Bronchogen | 2 mg | Injection | 12 weeks" inside the lung-stack protocol. Newer 2025-12-05 content extends duration; the 2025-03-26 source frames 2 mg/day as the high-acuity tier capped at 45 days. Both should be surfaced to the clinician, not averaged.

chronic.verbatim_citation: Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26): "🟢 Longevity & Maintenance Protocol: Dosage: 500 mcg (0.5 mg) subcutaneously daily / Duration: 30 days, repeated every 4–6 months / Ideal For: General respiratory health, anti-aging, immunity enhancement, and ongoing lung maintenance." Hunter email threadId 195d486531c37652 (2025-03-26): "🟡 Intermediate Protocol (Long COVID, Asthma, Mild COPD): Dosage: 1 mg subcutaneously daily / Duration: 30–60 days / Ideal For: Long COVID sufferers, mild-to-moderate asthma, chronic bronchitis, or COPD patients seeking stronger improvement in breathing, energy, and inflammation reduction." Hunter email threadId 19af0c0c3b0300ba (2025-12-05): "Bronchogen | 2 mg | Injection | 12 weeks."
